pattern: Stepping through the string in blocks of 2k and reversing only the leading k of each block handles the partial tail naturally via slicing bounds.
hints: Process the string in chunks of size 2k starting from the front.
Within each chunk reverse only the first k characters, leaving the rest untouched.
Iterate i over 0, 2k, 4k, ...; reverse the slice from i to min(i+k, len) and keep the remainder of the chunk as is.

edge_inputs.description: k larger than string reverses all
k of one is a no-op

stress.description: random lowercase string with a random k
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    import string
    n = max(1, size)
    s = ''.join(rng.choice(string.ascii_lowercase) for _ in range(n))
    k = rng.randrange(1, n + 1)
    return [s, k]
